summary: Stability update for startup, local testing, orders, and app updates.
release_notes: Stopped duplicate order rows from appearing after order submission.
Fixed startup on Windows so the app uses the correct local Python environment more reliably.
Added a local dev terminal mode so server logs stay visible while testing.
Fixed missing timezone data dependency that could break local startup.
Prevented the Windows app from opening a second desktop window if it is already running.
Improved the updater experience with release notes, clearer status messages, and a download progress bar.
